glue_code_added: Inlined shell.css verbatim into a single <style> block in <head>.
Inlined shell.html skeleton verbatim into <body> ahead of all <script> blocks so the DOM (#cls-location, #cls-status, #cls-loading, #cls-result) is fully parsed before any script executes.

Inlined location.js, storelookup.js, presentation.js, shell.js verbatim, each in its own <script> block, in strict dependency order (section-1 -> section-2 -> section-3 -> section-4). No code was modified during inlining — only concatenated.
Added a single-file artifact header comment documenting the assembly and the no-CDN / OSM-APIs-only network profile.

issues_resolved_during_integration.issue: Init-order seam: shell.js calls start() either on DOMContentLoaded or immediately if document.readyState is not 'loading'. start() needs both the DOM skeleton and the CLS_Location/CLS_StoreLookup/CLS_Presentation globals.
issues_resolved_during_integration.resolution: Placed the shell HTML skeleton before all <script> blocks and ordered the four module scripts location -> storelookup -> presentation -> shell. By the time shell.js runs, parsing has reached it (so the skeleton above exists) and the three module IIFEs have already published their globals. shell.js also carries a defensive module-presence guard (S4.A1) that renders an honest error rather than a blank screen if a global is missing.

issues_resolved_during_integration.issue: Naming seam: all four modules use the CLS_ global prefix and the cls- CSS class prefix.
issues_resolved_during_integration.resolution: No collision — each module publishes exactly one distinct global (CLS_Location, CLS_StoreLookup, CLS_Presentation, CLS_Shell) and CSS classes are uniformly cls-* with no overlap. No renaming needed.

issues_resolved_during_integration.issue: Asset seam: sections were authored as separate .js/.css/.html files.
issues_resolved_during_integration.resolution: All vendored inline into the single index.html — zero sibling asset files, zero CDN references. The only network calls the assembled artifact makes are to the public OSM Overpass and Nominatim APIs the build requires (S4.A4).

verification.error_empty_edge_tests: 5/6 pass (1 harness artifact — see edge-case report ECT-S2.A4-offline)
